summary: Successfully verified AI integration fixes from iteration 1. All backend APIs working (11/11 passed), frontend UI fully functional, and Gemini AI retry logic working perfectly. Question generation and answer evaluation now working consistently without 503 errors.

design_issues.issue: Tech stack options only appear after selecting a category - could be clearer UX

passed_tests: All 11 backend API endpoints working (100% success)
AI question generation with retry logic (POST /api/interview/question)
AI answer evaluation with retry logic (POST /api/interview/evaluate)
Dashboard overview, skill radar, score trend (GET /api/dashboard/*)
Landing page loads with hero and category cards
Setup page navigation and selection flow
Interview room loads and displays questions
Answer submission and AI evaluation working
Score display and feedback working (received 6/10 score)
Dashboard page navigation and data display
History page with session tabs and filtering
Full interview flow from setup to completion
Gemini API retry logic with model fallback working consistently

success_percentage.integration: 100% (AI integration now working with retry logic)
